_doc: GX.5 The Oakvale Deepdelve — ONE deep multi-level dungeon reached through SEVERAL overworld cave mouths. Every mouth Location carries dungeon_key 'deepdelve' + deep_dungeon, so game_api_mixin.enter_dungeon resolves them all to the SAME shared, persistent, DEEP (deep_levels) dungeon; dungeon_return_pos remembers which mouth you came in by. Wilderness mouths seed here; the SECRET Oakvale stair is GX.5b (deepdelve_secret.py).
rumor: Miners speak of a sunless stair beneath the hills — the old Deepdelve, they say, still runs down and down, and its lower reaches have never been mapped.

mouths.name: Blackroot Cleft
mouths.legend: A jagged cleft where blackroot trees claw at a cave mouth breathing cold, still air.

mouths.name: The Sunless Stair
mouths.legend: A worn stone stair descending into the mountain's root, its steps slick and lightless.

mouths.name: The Drowned Adit
mouths.legend: A half-flooded mine adit, the water black and still — an old way down into the Deepdelve.
